title: Fix form reset clearing saved database records

requirements.text: Fix the form reset logic across all form modals (PurchaseOrderFormModal, SupplierFormModal, StaffFormModal, ShiftFormModal, Expenses) so that resetting form fields on page load or modal mount only clears the local React form state (input fields return to blank defaults) and does NOT delete, overwrite, or otherwise affect any saved records stored in the Zustand app store or backend database.

quotes: Previous data and history were also removed.
Form fields reset on page load (blank form for new entry), Existing saved records remain intact in the database

acceptanceCriteria: On page load, all form modals open with blank/default field values.
All previously saved records (purchase orders, suppliers, staff, shifts, expenses) remain visible and intact after page load.
Submitting a new record adds it to the existing list without removing prior entries.
The Zustand store seed data and any persisted records are not cleared or reset during form initialization.
No store actions that delete or overwrite collections (e.g., setState resetting arrays to empty) are called during form mount or page load.

constraints: Do not modify backend data models or storage logic.
Do not alter immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or any component under frontend/src/components/ui.
Form field reset must only affect local component state, not global Zustand store state.
nonGoals: Adding a manual Reset button to forms.
Changing any UI layout or visual styling.
